Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 
18 
DRUG_THER_CHG_NUM 
LABEL: 
Number of drug therapy problem resolutions with prescribers 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the number of drug therapy problem resolutions with prescribers resulting from 
recommendations made to beneficiary's prescriber(s) as a result of Medication Therapy Management 
(MTM) services 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE:
